Class Booking

java.lang.Object
com.venueOps.lancastermusichallproject.operations.Booking
public class Booking extends Object
Class that stores attributes for a booking

Neil Daya

  • Constructor Details

    • Booking

      public Booking(String bookingName, List<IEvent> events, Client client, LocalDate signed_date, BigDecimal total_price, LocalDate start_date, LocalDate end_date, String status)
      Constructor for storing booking details in the database
      Parameters:
      bookingName - name of the booking
      events - list of events for the booking
      client - client who made the booking
      signed_date - date booking was made
      total_price - total price of the booking
      start_date - start date of the first event
      end_date - end date of the last event
      status - confirmed / completed / cancelled

    • Booking

      public Booking(int bookingID, String bookingName, List<IEvent> events, Client client, LocalDate signed_date, BigDecimal total_price, LocalDate start_date, LocalDate end_date, String status)
      Constructor for loading booking details from the database
      Parameters:
      bookingID - unique identifier assigned by the database
      bookingName - name of the booking
      events - list of events for the booking
      client - client who made the booking
      signed_date - date booking was made
      total_price - total price of the booking
      start_date - start date of the first event
      end_date - end date of the last event
      status - confirmed / completed / cancelled
